zh.Bretforton,Worcester,England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾布特福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Reade於1529年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆時，她的父親Richard Reade39歲，母親Jane Rudhall43歲。她於1541年10月2日與Anthony Washburne在英國武斯特斯爾巴澤結婚。他們至少是14個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1627年享年99歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Reade于1529年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆时，她的父亲Richard Reade39岁，母亲Jane Rudhall43岁。她于1541年10月2日与Anthony Washburne在英国武斯特斯爾巴澤结婚。他们至少是14个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1627年享年99岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Reade was born in 1529, in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Reade, was 39 and her mother, Jane Rudhall, was 43. She married Anthony Washburne on 2 October 1541, in Badsey, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 14 sons and 8 daughters. She died about 1627, at the age of 99, and was buried in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Reade est née en 1529, à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Reade, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Jane Rudhall, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Anthony Washburne le 2 octobre 1541, à Badsey, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 14 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1627, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Englan: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Reade 1529 in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Reade 39 und ihre Mutter Jane Rudhall 43. Sie hat am 2. Oktober 1541 in Badsey, Worcestershire, England Anthony Washburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 14 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb um 1627 im Alter von 99 Jahren und wurde in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Anthony Washburne il 2 ottobre 1541, nel Badsey, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 14 figli e 8 figlie. Morì circa 1627, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolta a Wichenford, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Readeが1529年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで生まれた時，父Richard Readeは39歳，母Jane Rudhallは43歳であった。1541年10月2日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアバドセイでAnthony Washburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも14人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1627年に99歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Reade(이)가 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Reade(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Rudhall(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1541년 10월 2일 영국 워스스터실르 바드시에서 Anthony Washburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1627년 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Englan: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Reade nasceu em 1529, em Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Reade, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Jane Rudhall, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Anthony Washburne em 2 de outubro de 1541, em Badsey, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 14 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1627, com 99 anos, e foi sepultada em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Englan: станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Reade родилась в 1529 г. в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Reade было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Rudhall, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Washburne 2 октября 1541 г. в местности бадси, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла около 1627 г. в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Anthony Washburne el 2 de octubre de 1541, en Badsey, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 14 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1627, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultada en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
